meta.description: Hierarchical acrostics for Shamar Bible memorization fetched from Google Sheets

OT.acrostic: IN THE HISTORY BOOKS TRULY WE SEE A PERFECT PLAN

NT.acrostic: JESUS GAVE US NEW LIFE ETERNALLY

bookAcrostics.GEN: INITIAL FALL, CALLING ABRAHAM, ISAAC TO JACOB, JOSEPH IN EGYPT
bookAcrostics.EXO: NATION ESCAPES EGYPT, GET LAW, CREATE TABERNACLE
bookAcrostics.LEV: TEACHING GOD'S LAWS TO THE PEOPLE
bookAcrostics.NUM: HISTORY OF ISRAEL'S FORTY WILDERNESS YEARS
bookAcrostics.DEU: EARNESTLY REPEATS THE LAW BEFORE CANAAN
bookAcrostics.1SA: TWO KINGS CHOSEN BY GOD: SAUL AND DAVID
bookAcrostics.2KI: YEARS OF SIN UNTIL BOTH OUSTED
bookAcrostics.2CH: OUR TEMPLE, SOLOMON'S ROYAL LINE UNTIL TAKEN
bookAcrostics.JOB: THE STORY OF A RIGHTEOUS MAN WHO LOST ALL HE EVER HAD
bookAcrostics.PSA:
RESPONDING TO GOD'S GOODNESS KING DAVID WORSHIPS 
OUR GREAT KING WHO WILL REDEEM US FROM 
YEARS OF DEEP SORROW 
AND PREVAIL FOREVER. 
LET OUR PRAISES GO UP TO JERUSALEM AND BRING HIM GLORY.
bookAcrostics.ISA: WARNINGS OF JUDGMENT AND PROMISES OF A NEW KING, SUFFERING SERVANT, NEW CREATION
bookAcrostics.JER: ENTRY TO BABYLON PROPHESIED AND A NEW COVENANT OF FORGIVENESS
bookAcrostics.EZK: END OF JUDAH PROPHESIED AND THEN A NEW TEMPLE IN JERUSALEM
bookAcrostics.MAT: JESUS THE ANOINTED KING OF ISRAEL
bookAcrostics.JUD: LOOK OUT FOR THESE UNGODLY MEN
